tools.name: query_production
tools.description: Query monthly oil, gas, and water production data from Argentine hydrocarbon wells. Data covers 2006-present with ~18M records. Can be filtered and grouped by basin, company, geological formation, and time period.

tools.name: query_wells
tools.description: Search and filter Argentine oil & gas wells. Returns well location, type, status, cumulative production, and technical data. ~50,000 wells available.

tools.name: query_prices
tools.description: Query international and local energy prices. Includes WTI, Brent, Henry Hub (daily), Argentine crude prices (Escalante, Medanito), and exchange rates (official, blue, MEP, CCL).

tools.name: query_investments
tools.description: Query upstream oil & gas investments in Argentina by company, basin, and year. Data includes drilling, completion, and infrastructure expenditure in millions USD.

tools.name: query_trade
tools.description: Query Argentina hydrocarbon trade balance (exports/imports). Covers crude oil (HS 2709), refined products (HS 2710), and natural gas (HS 2711). Values in FOB USD.

tools.name: get_schema
tools.description: Get the database schema and metadata. Returns table names, columns, types, descriptions, units, and example values. Use this to understand what data is available before querying.

tools.name: execute_sql
tools.description: Execute arbitrary read-only SQL against the DuckDB database. Only SELECT and WITH statements are allowed. Use get_schema first to understand available tables and columns. Available on Professional tier and above.

tools.name: get_data_freshness
tools.description: Get the latest data available in each table — last period, date range, and total records. Use this to understand how current the data is.
